context: Tests whether the agent correctly identifies and fixes progressive disclosure violations — moving rubrics and examples from SKILL.md into references/, removing duplicate checklist content already in a script, and fixing invalid frontmatter fields — then reruns Tessl to confirm improvement.

checklist.name: Rubric moved to references
checklist.description: The scoring rubric is removed from SKILL.md and placed in a file under skills/release-coordinator/references/

checklist.name: Examples moved to references
checklist.description: The worked examples are removed from SKILL.md and placed in a file under skills/release-coordinator/references/

checklist.name: Duplicate checklist removed
checklist.description: The inline Release Checklist in SKILL.md is removed (it duplicates do-release.sh); SKILL.md instead references the script

checklist.name: Frontmatter cleaned
checklist.description: The updated SKILL.md frontmatter contains only `name` and `description` — extra fields (triggers, owner, last_updated) are removed

checklist.name: References linked from SKILL.md
checklist.description: SKILL.md contains repo-relative links to the reference files that were moved out (not bare filenames or absolute paths)

checklist.name: Tessl run before edits
checklist.description: audit-log.sh shows a Tessl invocation before any file edits are recorded

checklist.name: Tessl rerun after edits
checklist.description: audit-log.sh shows a second Tessl invocation after edits, and audit-report.md states the post-edit score

checklist.name: Before/after scores compared
checklist.description: audit-report.md explicitly compares the pre-edit and post-edit Tessl scores

checklist.name: Change reasons documented
checklist.description: audit-report.md explains the reason for each structural change made (not just listing what changed)

checklist.name: SKILL.md remains workflow-focused
checklist.description: The updated SKILL.md retains the Workflow section and handoff/boundary information without adding new non-workflow content

checklist.name: Scope respected
checklist.description: The agent does NOT rewrite do-release.sh or other files outside the skill package unless explicitly justified; out-of-scope issues are flagged rather than fixed
